name: quickadd
title: QuickAdd for Obsidian
description: Run QuickAdd choices, captures, and templates in your Obsidian vault straight from Raycast.
author: christian

commands.name: run-choice
commands.title: Run QuickAdd Choice
commands.description: Browse and run any QuickAdd choice, filling its inputs in Raycast.

commands.name: quick-capture
commands.title: Quick Capture
commands.description: Capture text to your vault through a QuickAdd capture choice without leaving Raycast.

preferences.name: captureChoice
preferences.title: Capture Choice
preferences.description: Name of the QuickAdd capture choice to send text to (as shown in Run QuickAdd Choice). Pick one that runs without prompts.

preferences.name: vault
preferences.title: Vault Name
preferences.description: Name of the Obsidian vault QuickAdd runs against (as shown in Obsidian's vault switcher).

preferences.name: cliPath
preferences.title: Obsidian CLI Path
preferences.description: Path to the Obsidian CLI binary. Leave empty to auto-detect.
